question: How do I request a caregiver interview?
answer: Simply browse our available caregivers page and click the 'Request Interview' button on any profile you're interested in. This will open WhatsApp with a pre-filled message. Our team will follow up within 24 hours to coordinate the interview.

question: What is the replacement guarantee?
answer: We offer a replacement guarantee depending on your package. If a caregiver doesn't work out within the first 30 days
section: we'll find you a replacement at no additional cost. The number of replacements depends on your chosen package.

question: What training do caregivers receive?
answer: Our caregivers complete a 10-module training program covering: personal hygiene
column8: and professionalism. Each module includes both theory and practical components.

question: How long does the training program take?
answer: The full training program takes approximately 2-3 weeks to complete. Caregivers are assessed at the end of each module and must pass all assessments to receive certification.
